title: On Semiconductor strikes $7 billion deal for Synaptics in physical AI push
title_zh: 安森美半导体与 Synaptics 达成 70 亿美元交易，推动物理 AI 发展
text: On Semiconductor said the deal bumps up its total addressable market by $30 billion to $243 billion by 2030.
zh: 安森美半导体表示，到 2030 年，这笔交易将使其潜在市场总额增加 300 亿美元，达到 2,430 亿美元。

title: Trump keeps turning Republican wins into loyalty tests — and political liabilities
title_zh: 特朗普不断将共和党的胜利变成忠诚度测试和政治责任
text: President Donald Trump’s moves on housing, FISA, Iran and Washington projects are creating new headaches for Republicans trying to show voters they can govern.
zh: 唐纳德·特朗普总统在住房、外国情报监视法案、伊朗和华盛顿项目方面的举措给试图向选民展示他们可以治理的共和党人带来了新的麻烦。

title: As Social Security faces trust fund depletion, some Washington lawmakers call for taxing high earners
title_zh: 由于社会保障面临信托基金枯竭，一些华盛顿立法者呼吁对高收入者征税
text: High earners may only contribute Social Security payroll taxes for part of the year. As the program faces funding woes, some lawmakers say that should change.
zh: 高收入者只能在一年中的部分时间缴纳社会保障工资税。由于该计划面临资金困境，一些立法者表示这种情况应该改变。

title: Apple stock gets slammed on bigger Mac, iPad price hikes. Why it can weather the storm
title_zh: 苹果股价因 Mac 和 iPad 价格上涨而受到重挫。为什么它能渡过难关
text: The stock had its worst session in more than a year as management made its first official move to pass higher memory costs onto consumers.
zh: 由于管理层首次正式采取行动将更高的内存成本转嫁给消费者，该股遭遇了一年多来最糟糕的表现。

title: Small cap-focused Russell 2000 becomes first U.S. benchmark to enter correction territory
title_zh: 以小盘股为主的罗素 2000 指数成为首个进入调整区间的美国基准指数
text: Small caps are especially sensitive to changes in oil prices and a slowdown in the economic cycle.
zh: 小盘股对油价变化和经济周期放缓尤其敏感。

title: Fed still expects to cut rates once this year despite spiking oil prices
title_zh: 尽管油价飙升，美联储仍预计今年降息一次
text: The central bank's so-called dot plot showed a median estimate of 3.4% for the federal funds rate, the same as at the end of last year.
zh: 央行所谓的点阵图显示，联邦基金利率的中值为3.4%，与去年年底相同。

title: The momentum trades of 2026 are breaking with gold, silver and South Korea down big
title_zh: 2026年的势头交易正在被打破，黄金、白银和韩国大幅下跌
text: Each of these assets caught a bid this year as investors nervous about their exposure to U.S. large cap tech sought out different asset classes.
zh: 由于投资者对美国大型科技公司的风险敞口感到紧张，因此这些资产今年都受到了竞购，纷纷寻求不同的资产类别。

title: ‘I have full guardianship’: My son has special needs. If I buy him a condo, will that hurt his benefits?
title_zh: “我有充分的监护权”：我的儿子有特殊需要。如果我给他买一套公寓，会损害他的福利吗？
text: “Another option would be for me to purchase the condo myself and have him pay me rent.”
zh: “另一个选择是我自己购买公寓，然后让他付我租金。”

title: The S&P 500 is at a critical crossroads. A break lower could signal more losses ahead.
title_zh: 标准普尔 500 指数正处于关键的十字路口。跌破可能预示着未来会有更多损失。
text: The S&P 500 on Thursday finished right on the cusp of a critical support line that, if broken, could portend more losses for stocks in the coming days and weeks.
zh: 标准普尔 500 指数周四收于关键支撑线的尖端，如果突破该支撑线，可能预示着未来几天和几周股市将出现更多损失。

title: Microsoft’s stock is suffering a historic June rout as investors balk at heavy spending
title_zh: 由于投资者对巨额支出犹豫不决，微软股价在 6 月份遭遇历史性暴跌
text: Those who owned Microsoft’s stock for the free-cash-flow profile now “are being asked to underwrite a capital-intensity cycle,” says an analyst.
zh: 一位分析师表示，那些因自由现金流而持有微软股票的人现在“被要求承保资本密集度周期”。

title: Can Qualcomm actually compete with Nvidia? Inside its bold data-center gamble.
title_zh: 高通真的能与英伟达竞争吗？其大胆的数据中心赌博。
text: Qualcomm is chasing a massive $40 billion transformation. Meta is already buying in.
zh: 高通正在寻求 400 亿美元的大规模转型。 Meta 已经开始买入。

title: ‘Supergirl’ is tracking toward a soft debut. It’s a reality check for the DC Studios reboot.
title_zh: 《女超人》即将软出道。这是对 DC 工作室重启的现实检验。
text: The studio was hoping to repeat the success of “Superman,” which powered a box-office turnaround for Warner Bros. last year and breathed new life into its DC comics franchise.
zh: 该工作室希望复制《超人》的成功，该片去年为华纳兄弟带来了票房扭亏为盈，并为其 DC 漫画系列注入了新的活力。

title: ‘Tell the story well’: China pushes brokerages to shape stock market narrative - South China Morning Post
title_zh: “讲好故事”：中国推动券商塑造股市叙事 - 南华早报
text: ‘Tell the story well’: China pushes brokerages to shape stock market narrative South China Morning Post
zh: “讲好故事”：中国推动券商塑造股市叙事 南华早报

title: Emerging Market Equities: AI, China, and India in Focus - Goldman Sachs Asset Management
title_zh: 新兴市场股票：聚焦人工智能、中国和印度 - 高盛资产管理
text: Emerging Market Equities: AI, China, and India in Focus Goldman Sachs Asset Management
zh: 新兴市场股票：聚焦人工智能、中国和印度 高盛资产管理

title: China ETFs: A Comprehensive Guide On How To Invest In China - KraneShares
title_zh: 中国ETF：如何投资中国的综合指南 - KraneShares
text: China ETFs: A Comprehensive Guide On How To Invest In China KraneShares
zh: 中国ETF：如何投资中国金瑞股份综合指南

title: Chicago Fed President Goolsbee says inflation is too high; Williams sees price pressures easing
title_zh: 芝加哥联储主席古尔斯比表示通胀过高；威廉姆斯认为价格压力有所缓解
text: In a live CNBC interview from his home district, Goolsbee declined to speculate on where he thinks interest rates are headed.
zh: 在他的家乡接受 CNBC 现场采访时，古尔斯比拒绝猜测他认为利率的走向。

title: Democrats probe Trump's troubled $16 million reflecting pool renovation
title_zh: 民主党人调查特朗普因泳池改造而陷入困境的 1600 万美元
text: President Donald Trump has attempted to spruce up Washington in advance of the country's 250th anniversary.
zh: 唐纳德·特朗普总统试图在建国 250 周年之际美化华盛顿。

title: Micron says the AI party is far from over, but not all are celebrating
title_zh: 美光表示人工智能派对还远未结束，但并非所有人都在庆祝
text: A blowout quarter for the memory maker is only lifting certain parts of the data center buildout.
zh: 这家内存制造商的井喷季度仅提升了数据中心扩建的某些部分。

title: Berkshire shares trade lower even after Abel scores good marks at meeting, earnings jump
title_zh: 即使阿贝尔在会议上取得好成绩、盈利大幅增长，伯克希尔股价仍走低
text: Many in the investment community were reassured by Abel's firm grasp over Berkshire's sprawling enterprise.
zh: 阿贝尔对伯克希尔庞大企业的坚定控制让投资界的许多人感到放心。

title: Why Palantir’s stock is having its worst month in years — even in the midst of an AI boom
title_zh: 为什么 Palantir 的股价经历了多年来最糟糕的一个月——即使是在人工智能繁荣时期
text: Down over 30% since the beginning of June, shares of Palantir just hit a new 52-week low
zh: Palantir股价自6月初以来下跌逾30%，创52周新低

title: Japanese stocks are on fire. Here’s what’s driving the hot streak.
title_zh: 日本股市火热。这就是推动这股热潮的原因。
text: Japanese equities have hit all-time highs at a pace not seen since 1989.
zh: 日本股市以 1989 年以来从未有过的速度创下历史新高。

title: SpaceX FOMO is officially over. Space stocks across the board are getting punished.
title_zh: SpaceX FOMO 正式结束。太空股全面受到惩罚。
text: Investors seem to be having second thoughts about the lofty valuations in the sector, an analyst said.
zh: 一位分析师表示，投资者似乎对该行业的高估值重新考虑。

title: Apple’s price hikes suggest inflation won’t slow quickly, even as gas gets cheaper
title_zh: 苹果的提价表明，即使天然气变得更便宜，通胀也不会迅速放缓
text: Gas is getting cheaper, but Apple raising prices probably tells us more about the persistence of inflation.
zh: 天然气越来越便宜，但苹果提高价格可能更多地告诉我们通货膨胀的持续性。

title: China to back ‘qualified’ foreign firms for listing on domestic markets - South China Morning Post
title_zh: 中国支持“合格”外国公司在国内市场上市 - 《南华早报》
text: China to back ‘qualified’ foreign firms for listing on domestic markets South China Morning Post
zh: 中国支持“合格”外国公司在国内市场上市 《南华早报》

title: Chinese Economy Is Booming, But Stock Markets Haven’t Recovered in 20 Years - Yahoo Finance
title_zh: 中国经济蓬勃发展，股市20年未复苏 - 雅虎财经
text: Chinese Economy Is Booming, But Stock Markets Haven’t Recovered in 20 Years Yahoo Finance
zh: 中国经济蓬勃发展，但股市20年未复苏 雅虎财经

title: Commentary: What China’s underperforming tech stocks say about its real economy - CNA
title_zh: 评论：中国表现不佳的科技股对其实体经济有何影响 - CNA
text: Commentary: What China’s underperforming tech stocks say about its real economy CNA
zh: 评论：中国表现不佳的科技股对其实体经济有何影响 CNA

title: China in the Year of the Horse: A stable trot or a brisk gallop? - J.P. Morgan Private Bank
title_zh: 马年的中国：稳健的小跑还是轻快的驰骋？ - 摩根大通私人银行
text: China in the Year of the Horse: A stable trot or a brisk gallop? J.P. Morgan Private Bank
zh: 马年的中国：稳健的小跑还是轻快的驰骋？摩根大通私人银行

title: Is China’s High-Quality Investment Output Economically Viable? - Carnegie Endowment for International Peace
title_zh: 中国的高质量投资产出在经济上是否可行？ - 卡内基国际和平基金会
text: Is China’s High-Quality Investment Output Economically Viable? Carnegie Endowment for International Peace
zh: 中国的高质量投资产出在经济上是否可行？卡内基国际和平基金会

title: China tightens market oversight to create 'slow bull' momentum - Reuters
title_zh: 中国收紧市场监管创造“慢牛”势头 - 路透中文网
text: China tightens market oversight to create 'slow bull' momentum Reuters
zh: 中国收紧市场监管创造“慢牛”势头 路透

title: Who ate all the Chinese stock market returns? - Financial Times
title_zh: 中国股市的收益全部被谁吃掉了？ - 金融时报
text: Who ate all the Chinese stock market returns? Financial Times
zh: 中国股市的收益全部被谁吃掉了？金融时报

title: Microsoft lifts price of Xbox consoles due to soaring component costs
title_zh: 由于组件成本飙升，微软提高了 Xbox 游戏机的价格
text: Microsoft said it's increasing the price of Xbox game consoles after Apple announced price hikes for MacBooks and iPads.
zh: 在苹果宣布 MacBook 和 iPad 涨价后，微软表示将提高 Xbox 游戏机的价格。

title: Iranian leader scoffs at Trump claim that Tehran must buy U.S. farm products with unfrozen assets
title_zh: 伊朗领导人嘲笑特朗普声称德黑兰必须用未冻结资产购买美国农产品
text: "The only crop we're harvesting is what you planted: decades of mistrust," Iranian parliament speaker Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf said in a social media post.
zh: 伊朗议会议长穆罕默德·巴格尔·加利巴夫在社交媒体帖子中表示：“我们收获的唯一作物就是你们种植的：数十年的不信任。”

title: Judge says lawsuit against Trump DOJ 'anti-weaponization' fund will proceed
title_zh: 法官称针对特朗普司法部“反武器化”基金的诉讼将继续进行
text: Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche originally set up the fund as part of a settlement of a lawsuit by President Donald Trump against the IRS.
zh: 代理司法部长托德·布兰奇最初设立该基金是为了解决唐纳德·特朗普总统针对美国国税局提起的诉讼。

title: Judge blocks Trump's rule limiting federal student loans for certain grad school borrowers
title_zh: 法官阻止特朗普限制某些研究生院借款人联邦学生贷款的规定
text: A federal judge temporarily blocked Trump's limits on how much certain graduate students can borrow. That policy was set to go into effect July 1.
zh: 一名联邦法官暂时阻止了特朗普对某些研究生可以借款的金额的限制。该政策定于 7 月 1 日生效。

title: Bond ETF flows surge in hunt for yield: 'Market sniffing out something here,' says BlackRock exec
title_zh: 贝莱德高管表示，债券 ETF 流量激增，寻求收益：“市场正在嗅出一些东西”
text: Bond investors are abandoning aggregate benchmarks in favor of a broad mix of fixed-income investments to maximize yield with the stock market on edge.
zh: 债券投资者正在放弃总体基准，转而选择广泛的固定收益投资组合，以在股市紧张的情况下实现收益最大化。

title: Chan Zuckerberg Initiative's Biohub to open new rare disease funding round
title_zh: 陈·扎克伯格倡议的 Biohub 将开启新一轮罕见病融资
text: Chan Zuckerberg Initiative's Biohub will offer new grants to the rare disease community while expanding its AI drug repurposing partnership with Every Cure.
zh: 陈·扎克伯格计划的 Biohub 将向罕见疾病界提供新的资助，同时扩大与 Every Cure 的人工智能药物再利用合作伙伴关系。

title: We're trimming a health-care stock into strength and raising our price target
title_zh: 我们正在削减医疗保健股以增强其实力并提高我们的目标价
text: It's been a remarkable turnaround for a name we started to buy a little too high and a little too fast when the Iran war broke out.
zh: 对于一个在伊朗战争爆发时我们开始买入有点太高、有点太快的名字来说，这是一个了不起的转变。

title: Global recession is inevitable if Strait of Hormuz stays shut, says Citadel's Ken Griffin
title_zh: Citadel 的 Ken Griffin 表示，如果霍尔木兹海峡继续关闭，全球经济衰退将不可避免
text: A prolonged blockage of the Strait of Hormuz for the next six to 12 months will mean an unavoidable recession, the billionaire investor said.
zh: 这位亿万富翁投资者表示，未来 6 到 12 个月霍尔木兹海峡的长期封锁将意味着不可避免的经济衰退。

title: Iran tightens its grip on Strait of Hormuz, sending oil prices higher
title_zh: 伊朗收紧对霍尔木兹海峡的控制，推高油价
text: Oil risks fresh shocks as Iran appears to assert control over the waterway.
zh: 随着伊朗似乎声称控制了该水道，石油面临新的冲击。

title: I want to leave everything to my sons, but I’m terrified they’ll give it to my ex-husband. How do I prevent this?
title_zh: 我想把一切都留给我的儿子们，但我害怕他们会把它交给我的前夫。我该如何防止这种情况？
text: “I would not like my money to fall into the hands of my former spouse.”
zh: “我不希望我的钱落入我前配偶的手中。”

title: Amateur investors are changing how the stock market works. That’s creating opportunities for those who know where to look.
title_zh: 业余投资者正在改变股票市场的运作方式。这为那些知道去哪里寻找的人创造了机会。
text: The rise of the retail investor is making the market less efficient — and AI is compounding the problem, according to a quant at Goldman Sachs.
zh: 高盛的一位量化分析师表示，散户投资者的崛起正在降低市场效率，而人工智能则使问题变得更加复杂。

title: Why getting dumped from the Dow is the ultimate buy signal for this — or any — stock
title_zh: 为什么道指被抛售是这只股票或任何股票的最终买入信号
text: The “Dow curse” now favors Verizon over Alphabet.
zh: “道琼斯指数诅咒”现在对 Verizon 有利，而不是 Alphabet。

title: Take a cue from the rich: Do a midyear financial check-in
title_zh: 向富人学习：进行年中财务检查
text: Financial advisers would tell you to rebalance your portfolio at a midyear check-in. Make these 4 money moves instead.
zh: 财务顾问会告诉你在年中检查时重新平衡你的投资组合。相反，请进行这 4 次金钱行动。

title: MSCI Extends Review on Indonesia ‘Emerging Market’ Status - The Diplomat – Asia-Pacific
title_zh: MSCI 延长对印度尼西亚“新兴市场”地位的审查 - The Diplomat – Asia-Pacific
text: MSCI Extends Review on Indonesia ‘Emerging Market’ Status The Diplomat – Asia-Pacific
zh: MSCI 延长对印度尼西亚“新兴市场”地位的审查 The Diplomat – Asia-Pacific

title: If you're surprised by how well the stock market is doing, so is Jamie Dimon - Fortune
title_zh: 如果你对股市的表现感到惊讶，那么杰米·戴蒙 (Jamie Dimon) 也会如此 - 《财富》
text: If you're surprised by how well the stock market is doing, so is Jamie Dimon Fortune
zh: 如果您对股市的表现感到惊讶，那么杰米·戴蒙 (Jamie Dimon) 也会感到惊讶 - 财富中文网

title: Bayer wins Supreme Court case making it harder to sue over glyphosate in Monsanto's Roundup
title_zh: 拜耳赢得最高法院诉讼，使孟山都农达中的草甘膦诉讼变得更加困难
text: Glyphosate, used in Roundup weedkiller, is the most commonly used weedkiller in agriculture, and it has long been linked to cancer claims.
zh: 农达除草剂中使用的草甘膦是农业中最常用的除草剂，长期以来一直与癌症声称有关。

title: GM reveals 2027 GMC Sierra pickup with new V-8 engines, redesigned styling
title_zh: 通用汽车推出 2027 款 GMC Sierra 皮卡，配备全新 V-8 发动机和重新设计的造型
text: The new GMC Sierra trucks are crucial to GM's sales and earnings, especially highly profitable luxury Denali and off-road AT4 models.
zh: 新款GMC Sierra卡车对通用汽车的销售和盈利至关重要，尤其是利润丰厚的豪华Denali和越野AT4车型。

title: Luxury spending now driven by experiences and 'inheritourism'
title_zh: 奢侈品消费现在由体验和“遗产旅游”驱动
text: While luxury goods sales are expected to grow between 1% and 4%, experiences are on track for growth of between 3% and 7% this year, according to a new report.
zh: 一份新报告显示，虽然奢侈品销售额预计将增长 1% 至 4%，但体验今年的增长有望在 3% 至 7% 之间。

title: Here's our plan for FedEx Freight's stock heading into its first earnings call
title_zh: 这是我们对联邦快递货运公司股票首次财报电话会议的计划
text: The Investing Club holds its "Morning Meeting" every weekday at 10:20 a.m. ET.
zh: 投资俱乐部在每个工作日上午 10:20（东部时间）举行“晨会”。

title: Qualcomm stock pops 15% after chipmaker almost doubles projection for 2029 non-handset revenue
title_zh: 芯片制造商将 2029 年非手机收入预测几乎翻倍后，高通股价上涨 15%
text: Qualcomm's primary business has been smartphones, which accounted for two-thirds of the company's product revenue in it's most recent quarter.
zh: 高通的主要业务是智能手机，该业务占该公司最近一个季度产品收入的三分之二。

title: Federal Reserve says U.S. banks can withstand $708 billion in losses amid overhaul of capital rules
title_zh: 美联储称美国银行可承受资本规则改革期间7080亿美元的损失
text: The Fed's annual exercise comes at a pivotal moment for bank regulation because, unlike previous years, the results will not affect capital requirements.
zh: 美联储的年度演习正值银行监管的关键时刻，因为与往年不同，此次演习的结果不会影响资本要求。

title: ‘It feels like a medical miracle’: How did a single QR code coupon cut my $618 Walgreens prescription to $15?
title_zh: “感觉就像一个医学奇迹”：一张二维码优惠券如何将我 618 美元的沃尔格林处方药减至 15 美元？
text: “This medication was generic.”
zh: “这种药物是通用的。”

title: This disease is more expensive than cancer and heart disease combined. And it’s only going to get worse.
title_zh: 这种疾病的治疗费用比癌症和心脏病的总和还要高。而且情况只会变得更糟。
text: “People should be alarmed. This is a health crisis. It’s also an economic crisis for families and government,”
zh: “人们应该保持警惕。这是一场健康危机。这对家庭和政府来说也是一场经济危机，”

title: Bayer’s stock jumps after Supreme Court sides with Roundup weedkiller manufacturer
title_zh: 最高法院支持农达除草剂制造商后，拜耳股价上涨
text: The court ruled that states cannot have differing labeling warning rules than federal law requires.
zh: 法院裁定，各州不得制定与联邦法律要求不同的标签警告规则。

title: First-quarter GDP gets big boost, but it’s not really great news
title_zh: 第一季度GDP大幅增长，但这并不是什么好消息
text: The official scorecard of the U.S. economy was updated to show the economy grew at a 2.1% annual pace in the first three months of the year, faster than the previously reported 1.6%. Good news, right? Not really.
zh: 美国经济官方记分卡更新显示，今年前三个月经济年增长率为2.1%，高于此前报道的1.6%。好消息，对吧？并不真地。

title: SpaceX stock is a terrible buy — what that actually means for the bull market
title_zh: SpaceX 股票是一次糟糕的买入——这对牛市实际上意味着什么
text: Overhyped IPOs rarely make you money in the short term. That doesn’t mean it’s time to sell your stocks..
zh: 过度炒作的首次公开募股很少能在短期内让你赚钱。这并不意味着是时候出售你的股票了。

title: Micron has suddenly become one of the world’s most important stocks
title_zh: 美光突然成为全球最重要的股票之一
text: “It is hard to overstate how significant last night’s earnings were,” a Mizuho managing director said.
zh: 瑞穗一位董事总经理表示：“昨晚的盈利有多么重要都不为过。”

title: Apple’s MacBooks and iPads are getting more expensive as the memory crunch deepens
title_zh: 随着内存短缺的加剧，苹果的 MacBook 和 iPad 变得越来越贵
text: Apple increased prices on select MacBooks and iPads Thursday morning on the heels of a blowout Micron earnings report.
zh: 继美光科技公布井喷的财报后，周四上午，苹果公司提高了部分 MacBook 和 iPad 的价格。

title: Six Charts That Explain China’s Weakening Economy - Bloomberg.com
title_zh: 六张图表解释中国经济疲软 - Bloomberg.com
text: Six Charts That Explain China’s Weakening Economy Bloomberg.com
zh: 六张图表解释中国经济疲软 Bloomberg.com

title: Beijing is summoning executives again, but here's why that's causing less worry than in 2021 - CNBC
title_zh: 北京再次召集高管，但这就是为什么这比 2021 年引起的担忧有所减轻 - CNBC
text: Beijing is summoning executives again, but here's why that's causing less worry than in 2021 CNBC
zh: 北京再次召集高管，但这就是为什么这比 2021 年 CNBC 引起的担忧要少

title: Core inflation rate hit 3.4% in May, highest since October 2023, Fed’s preferred gauge shows
title_zh: 美联储首选指标显示，5 月份核心通胀率达到 3.4%，为 2023 年 10 月以来最高
text: The personal consumption expenditures price index was expected to show a 4.1% annual increase.
zh: 个人消费支出价格指数预计同比增长4.1%。

title: Apple raises prices on MacBook and iPad due to memory crunch, hints at more to come
title_zh: 由于内存短缺，苹果提高了 MacBook 和 iPad 的价格，并暗示还会有更多价格上涨
text: Tim Cook said last week that Apple would hike prices due to surging memory and storage costs.
zh: 蒂姆·库克上周表示，由于内存和存储成本飙升，苹果将提高价格。

title: JPMorgan names Doug Petno and Troy Rohrbaugh co-presidents as longtime exec Marianne Lake exits
title_zh: 摩根大通任命 Doug Petno 和 Troy Rohrbaugh 为联席总裁，长期执行官 Marianne Lake 退出
text: The moves would appear to make Doug Petno and Troy Rohrbaugh the most obvious possible successors to JPMorgan Chase CEO Jamie Dimon.
zh: 这些举措似乎将使道格·佩特诺和特洛伊·罗尔博成为摩根大通首席执行官杰米·戴蒙最明显的可能继任者。

title: Wendy's shares soar for a second day as retail investors pile into their new meme darling
title_zh: 随着散户投资者涌入他们的新宠儿，温迪股价连续第二天飙升
text: The stock's advance appeared largely disconnected from company fundamentals and instead reflected a burst of social-media enthusiasm.
zh: 该股的上涨似乎很大程度上与公司基本面无关，而是反映了社交媒体热情的爆发。

title: GameStop’s CEO just sacrificed a $35 billion pay package. Here’s how it could impact his effort to buy eBay
title_zh: GameStop 的首席执行官刚刚牺牲了 350 亿美元的薪酬方案。以下是这对他收购 eBay 的努力有何影响
text: Ryan Cohen has shared few details on how he'll move forward with his $56 billion offer for eBay since the company rejected the proposal in May.
zh: 自 5 月份 eBay 拒绝该提议以来，瑞安·科恩 (Ryan Cohen) 并未透露有关如何推进 eBay 560 亿美元报价的细节。

title: The world’s top-performing stock market still isn’t a developed market. Here’s why, according to the MSCI chief
title_zh: 全球表现最好的股票市场仍然不是发达市场。 MSCI 总裁表示，原因如下
text: MSCI CEO Henry Fernandez said South Korea's stock market still falls short of developed market standards.
zh: MSCI首席执行官亨利·费尔南德斯表示，韩国股市仍低于发达市场标准。

title: Iraq piles pressure on OPEC over quota dispute after UAE exit
title_zh: 阿联酋退出后，伊拉克就配额争端向欧佩克施加压力
text: Reuters reported that though Iraq had considered leaving OPEC, the ​current plan is to remain a member of the group while seeking a higher output quota.
zh: 路透社报道称，尽管伊拉克曾考虑退出欧佩克，但目前的计划是保留该组织成员身份，同时寻求更高的产量配额。

title: Darden Restaurants earnings beat estimates but Olive Garden growth weakens
title_zh: 达顿餐厅盈利超出预期，但橄榄园增长减弱
text: Same-store sales growth at Darden's fine-dining restaurants and Olive Garden fell short of expectations.
zh: 达顿高级餐厅和橄榄园的同店销售增长低于预期。

title: The Club's top 10 things to watch in the stock market Thursday
title_zh: 俱乐部周四股市最值得关注的十大事件
text: Another monster quarter from Micron has ignited a chip stock rally.
zh: 美光科技又一个强劲的季度引发了芯片股的上涨。

title: Micron stock jumps 18% in premarket trading after blockbuster earnings
title_zh: 美光科技股价在公布巨额盈利后盘前交易中上涨 18%
text: The company's revenue more than quadrupled from $9.3 billion a year earlier to $41.46 billion, it reported on Wednesday
zh: 据周三报道，该公司的收入从去年同期的 93 亿美元增长了四倍多，达到 414.6 亿美元

title: U.S. giving topped $600 billion for the first time last year. Megadonors and bequests are to thank
title_zh: 去年美国的捐赠首次突破 6000 亿美元。感谢巨额捐赠者和遗赠
text: The stock market rally turbocharged charitable giving in 2025, but primarily from wealthy donors.
zh: 股市上涨推动了 2025 年的慈善捐赠，但主要来自富有的捐赠者。

title: Bitcoin is having a tough year. Traders are betting it's going to get worse
title_zh: 比特币经历了艰难的一年。交易员押注情况会变得更糟
text: Options traders are treating this break like it could be the tip of an iceberg.
zh: 期权交易员将这次突破视为冰山一角。

title: These S&P 500 stocks are expected to make double-digit comebacks
title_zh: 这些标准普尔 500 指数股票预计将实现两位数的反弹
text: A list of 20 highly rated stocks favored by analysts for gains over the next year includes only one that has risen this year: Nvidia.
zh: 分析师青睐的 20 只高评级股票名单中，只有一只今年上涨：英伟达。

title: Consumer spending rises again — and now cheaper gas is on the way
title_zh: 消费者支出再次上升——天然气即将变得更便宜
text: Inflation is set to slow during the summer
zh: 夏季通胀将放缓

title: U.S. inflation tops 4%, PCE shows, but tumbling oil prices to bring price relief soon
title_zh: PCE显示美国通胀率突破4%，但油价暴跌将很快带来价格缓解
text: Worst inflation in three years may have peaked
zh: 三年来最严重的通胀可能已见顶

title: Chevron says no quick fix for gas prices as Trump takes on Big Oil: ‘It’s going to take time’
title_zh: 雪佛龙表示，随着特朗普与石油巨头的较量，天然气价格无法快速解决：“这需要时间”
text: Her comments come shortly after President Donald Trump ordered an investigation into Big Oil, accusing them of "gouging" consumers.
zh: 她发表此番言论之前不久，唐纳德·特朗普总统下令对大型石油公司进行调查，指责他们“欺骗”消费者。

title: TikTok and YouTube are reinventing sports viewership. Broadcasters are taking note
title_zh: TikTok 和 YouTube 正在重塑体育赛事收视率。广播公司正在注意
text: Leagues, teams and media networks are increasingly meeting younger fans on social media as platforms like TikTok, Roblox and YouTube capture most of their time.
zh: 随着 TikTok、Roblox 和 YouTube 等平台占据了年轻球迷的大部分时间，联盟、球队和媒体网络越来越多地在社交媒体上与年轻球迷见面。

title: Gold hovers around $4,000, silver holds below $60 — has the shimmer worn off the precious metal rally?
title_zh: 黄金徘徊在 4,000 美元左右，白银则维持在 60 美元以下——贵金属涨势的光芒是否已经消退？
text: Gold is down almost 8% so far this year, while silver has shed more than 20%.
zh: 今年迄今为止，黄金已下跌近 8%，而白银则下跌超过 20%。

title: Annuity options are growing in 401(k)s, but adoption remains limited
title_zh: 401(k) 中的年金选项不断增加，但采用率仍然有限
text: Annuity options are gaining ground in 401(k)s, amid worker concerns about retirement income and longevity risks.
zh: 由于工人对退休收入和长寿风险的担忧，年金选择在 401(k) 计划中越来越受欢迎。

title: Defense stocks slide again, as Germany’s naval U-turn shakes confidence in Europe’s rearmament boom
title_zh: 德国海军大转变动摇了人们对欧洲重整军备热潮的信心，国防股再次下滑
text: Rheinmetall and other European defense stocks fell for a second day, after Germany scrapped the F126 naval program, raising procurement concerns.
zh: 德国取消F126海军计划引发采购担忧后，莱茵金属公司和其他欧洲国防股连续第二天下跌。

title: Amazon adds new funding, lifting India AI and cloud investment to $48 billion
title_zh: 亚马逊追加新融资，将印度人工智能和云投资提升至 480 亿美元
text: Amazon announces fresh investment of $13 billion to expand AI and cloud infrastructure in India, taking its total investment to $48 billion.
zh: 亚马逊宣布新投资 130 亿美元，用于扩大印度的人工智能和云基础设施，使其总投资达到 480 亿美元。

title: Despite Trump trade rhetoric, Asian investors keep betting on U.S.: Former House Majority Leader Eric Cantor
title_zh: 尽管特朗普发表贸易言论，亚洲投资者仍继续押注美国：前众议院多数党领袖埃里克·坎托
text: Cantor said that investment flows still have "so much" allocation to the U.S., because investors recognise that the country was still one with a "rule of law."
zh: 坎托表示，投资流仍然有“大量”分配到美国，因为投资者认识到该国仍然是一个“法治”国家。

title: Cerebras CEO says margin forecast was 'misunderstood' as stock plummets after earnings
title_zh: Cerebras 首席执行官表示利润率预测被“误解”，因为盈利后股价暴跌
text: AI chipmaker Cerebras has a staggered lock-up expiration that includes some shares becoming available for trading this week.
zh: 人工智能芯片制造商 Cerebras 的禁售期是交错的，其中一些股票将于本周开始交易。

title: Toyota gains on General Motors in new U.S. sales forecast: 'GM may be looking over their shoulder'
title_zh: 丰田在新的美国销售预测中领先通用汽车：“通用汽车可能正在密切关注”
text: Toyota has notably leaned into hybrid vehicles while GM and others bet on all-electric vehicles, which saw lower-than-expected adoption from consumers.
zh: 丰田特别倾向于混合动力汽车，而通用汽车和其他公司则押注于全电动汽车，但消费者对全电动汽车的采用率低于预期。

title: Here are five themes Wall Street left behind while chasing a single trade
title_zh: 以下是华尔街在追逐单一交易时留下的五个主题
text: Citrini Research says the artificial intelligence trade is getting crowded and investors might start refocusing on some less popular sectors with promise.
zh: Citrini Research 表示，人工智能行业正变得越来越拥挤，投资者可能会开始重新关注一些不太受欢迎且有前景的行业。

title: ‘Take the money while you can’: I’m a CPA and tell my clients to take their Social Security early. Am I wrong?
title_zh: “趁你还可以的时候拿钱”：我是一名注册会计师，我告诉我的客户尽早领取社会保障。我错了吗？
text: “Only 8% to 10% of people wait until age 70 to claim.”
zh: “只有 8% 到 10% 的人等到 70 岁才领取养老金。”

title: Wall Street is coalescing on a single S&P 500 target. The power of round numbers is irresistible.
title_zh: 华尔街正在将标准普尔 500 指数作为单一目标。整数的力量是不可抗拒的。
text: Wall Street, and Main Street, love their round numbers, as at least four strategists have the same 8,000 year-end target on the S&P 500.
zh: 华尔街和大街都喜欢它们的整数，因为至少有四位策略师对标普 500 指数的年底目标同样是 8,000 点。

title: Retail investors have suddenly got more cautious in using options and margins. That may spell trouble for tech, says JPMorgan.
title_zh: 散户投资者在使用期权和保证金方面突然变得更加谨慎。摩根大通表示，这可能会给科技行业带来麻烦。
text: JPMorgan’s research suggests retail investors are becoming more cautious about levrerage after the market’s recent rally and this may spell trouble for the tech sector in which they have mostly focused.
zh: 摩根大通的研究表明，在市场近期上涨之后，散户投资者对杠杆率变得更加谨慎，这可能会给他们主要关注的科技行业带来麻烦。

title: My son passed away. Am I crazy to move to my former home and sell a house I bought in September?
title_zh: 我儿子去世了。我搬到以前的家并卖掉九月份买的房子是疯了吗？
text: “I raised my children there as a single mother, and it was the last home my son lived in before he passed away unexpectedly.”
zh: “我作为一个单身母亲在那里抚养了我的孩子，这是我儿子意外去世之前住的最后一个家。”

title: Two years after her death, Shannen Doherty’s Malibu home sells for $7.7 million
title_zh: 莎南·多尔蒂 (Shannen Doherty) 去世两年后，她在马里布的住宅以 770 万美元的价格售出
text: The home was described as her personal “sanctuary,” where she was able to escape the hustle and bustle of Hollywood, particularly during her lengthy cancer battle.
zh: 这个家被描述为她个人的“避难所”，在那里她能够逃离好莱坞的喧嚣，特别是在她漫长的癌症斗争期间。

title: One of India's largest gold exporters paid its managing director just $180 a month, investigators say in accounting probe
title_zh: 调查人员在会计调查中称，印度最大的黄金出口商之一每月仅向其总经理支付 180 美元
text: Indian authorities have found accounting discrepancies in books of Indian gold company Rajesh Exports, and owner of Swiss refiner Valcambi.
zh: 印度当局发现印度黄金公司 Rajesh Exports 和瑞士精炼商 Valcambi 的所有者的账簿存在会计差异。

title: Federal student loans have a new interest rate discount — here's who qualifies
title_zh: 联邦学生贷款有新的利率折扣——以下是符合条件的人
text: To qualify for the U.S. Department of Education's new interest rate discount on student loans, borrowers must meet several requirements. Here's what to know.
zh: 为了获得美国教育部新的学生贷款利率折扣的资格，借款人必须满足几项要求。以下是需要了解的内容。

title: Trump cancels signing of bipartisan housing bill ahead of tense meeting with GOP senators
title_zh: 特朗普在与共和党参议员举行紧张会议之前取消签署两党住房法案
text: President Donald Trump abruptly canceled the signing of a bill aimed at increasing housing affordability an hour before he was due at the Capitol for the ceremony.
zh: 唐纳德·特朗普总统在抵达国会大厦参加仪式前一小时突然取消了一项旨在提高住房负担能力的法案的签署。

title: The Wall Street equivalent of roster-cut day happens Friday. It’ll be one of the biggest volume days of the year.
title_zh: 华尔街的裁员日发生在周五。这将是一年中成交量最大的日子之一。
text: FTSE Russell is undertaking its semi-annual rebalancing — what the index provider calls its reconstitution — and the size of the undertaking could impact markets, say analysts.
zh: 分析师表示，富时罗素正在进行半年度再平衡（指数提供商称之为重组），该计划的规模可能会影响市场。

title: China’s Economy Is Deteriorating on Several Fronts - WSJ
title_zh: 中国经济在多个方面都在恶化 - 华尔街日报
text: China’s Economy Is Deteriorating on Several Fronts WSJ
zh: 中国经济在多个方面都在恶化 华尔街日报

title: From the US to China, 2025 a blockbuster year for stock markets - Al Jazeera
title_zh: 从美国到中国，2025 年是股市重磅之年 - 半岛电视台
text: From the US to China, 2025 a blockbuster year for stock markets Al Jazeera
zh: 从美国到中国，2025 年是股市重磅之年

title: Stocks rise to records, dollar edges up as investors await economic news - Reuters
title_zh: 投资者等待经济消息，股市上涨至创纪录水平，美元小幅上涨 - 路透中文网
text: Stocks rise to records, dollar edges up as investors await economic news Reuters
zh: 投资者等待经济消息，股市升至纪录高位，美元小幅上涨 - 路透中文网

title: China's wary consumers saved tons of cash. Now, they're pouring it into stocks. - markets.businessinsider.com
title_zh: 中国谨慎的消费者节省了大量现金。现在，他们正将其投入股市。 - market.businessinsider.com
text: China's wary consumers saved tons of cash. Now, they're pouring it into stocks. markets.businessinsider.com
zh: 中国谨慎的消费者节省了大量现金。现在，他们正将其投入股市。市场.businessinsider.com

title: China’s economic policy holds line as growth weakens - Mercator Institute for China Studies (MERICS)
title_zh: 随着增长放缓，中国经济政策保持不变 - 墨卡托中国研究中心 (MERICS)
text: China’s economic policy holds line as growth weakens Mercator Institute for China Studies (MERICS)
zh: 随着经济增长疲软，中国经济政策保持不变 墨卡托中国研究中心 (MERICS)

title: China’s surging A-share market: Recovery or bubble in disguise? - ThinkChina
title_zh: 中国A股市场飙升：复苏还是变相泡沫？ - 思考中国
text: China’s surging A-share market: Recovery or bubble in disguise? ThinkChina
zh: 中国A股市场飙升：复苏还是变相泡沫？思考中国
